allow: Bash(python -m py_compile main.py core/memory.py core/processes.py core/analyzer.py ui/app.py ui/process_table.py ui/memory_bar.py)

PowerShell(Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command rustc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command rustup -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe"\) { Write-Host ".cargo/bin exists" } else { Write-Host "Rust NOT installed" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---"; & "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" --version 2>&1; Write-Host "---PATH check---"; $env:Path -split ";" | Select-String "cargo")
